Buy Now Ask Question

Our attaché cases combine sophisticated design with practical utility, crafted from premium genuine leather for a polished, professional look. Perfect for modern professionals, they offer ample space for documents, devices, and essentials while maintaining a sleek, compact profile.

Designed for durability and style, Seven K attaché cases are the ideal blend of luxury and practicality, making a lasting impression in every setting.

Shop Now

Our Men Catalog

Brief Cases
Attaché Cases

Sets
Small Bags
Wallets

How Seven K Carefully Selects Premium Leather

At Seven K, we prioritize quality and craftsmanship by carefully selecting the finest leather. Partnering with trusted tanneries, we choose full-grain leather for its durability, natural beauty, and ability to develop a rich patina over time.

Every piece is meticulously inspected for texture, strength, and flawless grain, ensuring our bags and wallets meet the highest standards. With our commitment to excellence, you can trust that every Seven K product is crafted to last and designed to impress.

What they say about us

"Seven K Leather has set a new standard for craftsmanship. My wallet feels luxurious, and I get compliments on it all the time. It's durable, stylish, and worth every pound."
- Sally M.
"I absolutely love my new leather bag from Seven K! The quality is exceptional, and the attention to detail is unmatched. I've been using it daily, and it still looks brand new. Highly recommended!"
- Ahmed hamdi
"The perfect blend of elegance and practicality! I’ve been searching for a genuine leather handbag for months, and Seven K delivered exactly what I wanted. The packaging was also so classy—it felt like unwrapping a gift!"
Tamer El sharkawy
"As someone who values premium products, Seven K Leather did not disappoint. My leather bag not only looks fantastic but also holds up against daily wear and tear. Outstanding service and quality!"
- Mohamed Ahmed
